title: Galosphere Muskets
description: A resource+datapack for ewewukek's Musket Mod which integrates it with Galosphere, as well as adding some extra mod compatability.
body:
Galosphere Muskets is a very simple datapack and resource pack, bundled into a mod, which adds integration with ewewukek's Musket Mod and Galosphere. On top of that, it also adds general (and optional!) compatability with other mods to Musket Mod.

# New Textures + Galosphere Integration
Every Musket Mod item has been given a fresh coat of silver paint (or copper in the case of the blunderbuss), fitting in just a bit more with the vanilla game. On top of that, all items from ewewukek's Musket Mod now use Silver instead of Iron for crafting recipes, giving Galosphere's Silver another use!

# Other Mod Compat Changes
### Arsenal
All Musket Mod weapons can now be properly displayed in Arsenal's weapon racks.
### Enchancement
While Musket Mod's guns only support enchantments that are normally disabled by default when Enchancement is installed, an enchantment material for them has been added regardless, in the case those enchantments are reenabled, or another mod adds special enchantments to the guns.

# Future Plans
### Optional Vanity Pack (Coming Soon)
Soon you'll be able to customize your muskets with the Galosphere Muskets Vanity Pack, which will only work with the Vanity mod installed. The vanity pack adds a Gunsmithing Design and 4 alternate skins for each firearm, with a total of 20 skins! It isnt finished just yet however, but when it is, it will be bundled in a separate mod, and will be linked in this section.
